metadata.phase_status_vocabulary: phase status uses completed/pending/blocked; workflow root records implemented-local; implementation_status records local PASS with runtime deploy pending user approval
metadata.scope: minimal build pipeline change: switch Next.js 16 from Turbopack to webpack and keep the existing standalone instrumentation patch compatible when instrumentation is not emitted; adjacent admin audit helper extraction keeps current typecheck executable under Next App Router page export rules
metadata.rootCause: Next.js 16 default Turbopack emits `[project]/...` virtual module paths in App Route Handler bundles which @opennextjs/cloudflare 1.19.4 cannot resolve at Worker runtime, producing `Could not parse module` 500 on /api/auth/error et al
metadata.fix: Add --webpack flag to apps/web/package.json scripts.build; make scripts/patch-next-standalone-instrumentation.mjs skip cleanly when webpack output does not emit instrumentation.js
preconditionGates: current staging deploy reproduces /api/auth/error 500 with Could not parse module tail log
rollback target version IDs captured: efc4051e-160b-4c77-93ca-6a5751e952f3 (staging) / e608d54e-37a8-414d-865c-798ebfd71735 (production)
metadata.runtimePending: staging deploy + smoke + tail observation, then production deploy + smoke require explicit user approval gates

phase-11.boundary: local evidence captured; staging/production runtime evidence pending user approval
